name: product_id
description: Stable product identifier from the source catalog, prefixed by partner.

name: partner
description: Partner identifier, for example dm, edeka, or amazon.

name: name_de
description: German product name from the local synthetic catalog.

name: category
description: Product category used for filtering and retrieval.

name: description_de
description: German product description from the local synthetic catalog.

name: price
description: Current product price in the listed currency.

name: currency
description: ISO 4217 currency code, for example EUR.

name: tags
description: English tags used by the local keyword and hybrid retrieval paths.

name: tags_de
description: German tags from the local synthetic catalog.

name: availability
description: Whether the product is currently available.

name: is_promotion
description: Whether the product currently has an active promotion.

name: product_url
description: Partner product detail URL when available.

name: embedding_text
description: Deterministic text prepared for future embedding generation.

name: embedding
description: Future vector embedding values. Empty until Stage 8B or later.

name: updated_at
description: Timestamp for the last catalog row refresh.
